title: RDR2 Modpack
description: Red dead Themed Modpack with various features from the game
body: A Red Dead Redemption themed modpack with various new improvements to the horse and RDR2 themed weapons. A weapon wheel (toolbelt mod) and some cooking, brewing and farming addiditions. There are also bounties and a camera. New Furniture and Animals. Horse waggons too. (its recommended to increase the memory allocation)
